data.name: Account Creation Line 1
data.value: Glrglmrlgmgla mrlgmrrrrgl mrlg rrglrulgargrlrgl glarlrglargl glublrgl glorggrglargl plglrglgrrr.

data.name: Account Creation Line 2
data.value: Blgrlrgl mrlg glrglrgrlmgla blublurggrrr, mrogl, glorggrglargl mrrglmurgl prglprglrgl.

data.name: Account Creation?
data.comment: Button that pops up explination of account creation process

data.name: Chart Type
data.comment: Chart Types = single, double, co op

data.name: Phoenix Import Saving Progress
data.comment: I.E 4/192 Uploaded. 3:29 Remaining. 2 Failed to record

data.name: Public
data.comment: (on/off, if account is set to public)

data.name: Recorded On
data.comment: I.E Recorded on 12/6/2023 (I don't support date localization yet but will eventually)

data.name: Song Type
data.comment: Song Types = Arcade, Full Song, etc.

data.name: Unpassed ToDos
data.comment: I.E You have 19 level 24 charts marked To Do you haven't passed

data.name: Qualifier Submit Phrase 1
data.value: Murlg mrg grrrgl mrogl rgl brgl mrrr murg rgl urgmrg mrglrgl grglurg. Rgrgl mrg murglargrgl rgl murgargrl argrlblgrlmurgmurgrgl.

data.name: Qualifier Submit Phrase 2
data.value: Mrglrgl argl murlgrgl urgrulg arglgrrr! Murglrrglplgl mrgla prgl murlgrgl Murglargrgl argl rglglorg glrglglrgl grglrgl Discord argrlg Start.GG.

data.name: Level/Players
data.comment: Combined level/player-count input on the new-chart admin form.

data.name: Video info is not formatted correctly
data.value: Glarurg mrgurgl argl grrrgl gurgmrrr arglmrgl

data.name: Updated X Y
data.comment: {0} = song name, {1} = difficulty string (e.g. "S17"). Snackbar after a chart save on /ChartUpdate.

data.name: Huge thank you for KyleTT for compiling this information from FEFEMZ's recordings.
data.value: Gurgmrrr mrgl murlg mrlgrgl KyleTT mrlgrgl plglgrglmglamrogl mrglrgl glorglurg blgrl FEFEMZ's murgblub.
data.comment: Double space between "FEFEMZ's" and "recordings" preserved verbatim from source.

data.name: Note that this information is not final until referenced against actual released mix.
data.value: Mrrglurg rglmrgl mrglrgl glorglurg argl grrrgl mrrglub urglrgl blubbrgl grgl arglmrg grglmrglgurg mrgla.

data.name: Disclaimer: This list is being refined, some charts are missing step artists and some may have incorrect artists.
data.value: Mrrrglub: Mrglrgl glrglmrg argl brglrgl arglglar, grgl mrglrglrgl argrlg grrrmrg rglmrgl glargrlrgl mrrgl grgl mglar magrgl grrrargl glargrlrgl.

data.name: Disclaimer: This data was data-mined in NX2 and Prime, it is unconfirmed how accurate it is today.
data.value: Mrrrglub: Mrglrgl glubglrgl mragl glubglrgl-murg murg NX2 mrrgl Rulg, rgl argl glrglblgrlgrglrgrl grarrgrl rglmrlg rgl argl urg.

data.name: Note Count from Full Life to Death/Threshold based on Combo between Breaks
data.value: Mrrglurg Grglrgl blgrl Blubmrrr Murggrgl rgl Murgmrrr/Grrrmurg grarrgl urg Lrgl murggrl Brglubrgl

data.name: Notes to Full Life From Start of Song (50%)
data.value: Mrrglurgrgl rgl Blubmrrr Murggrgl Blgrl Start glub Glurgl (50%)

data.name: Starting life is 500, visible Life (Rainbow life bar) is 1000.
data.value: Murgargrlrgl murggrgl argl 500, urggrgl Murggrgl (Rgl murggrgl lrglglar) argl 1000.
data.comment: Double space between "visible" and "Life" preserved verbatim from source.

data.name: Lifebar overflows exponentially by level, up to about a 2350 overflow at level 28.
data.value: Murggrglblur gluburggrlrgl arglglubgurgblub blgrl rglmrgl, glrgl rgl argrlg mrg 2350 gluburggrl argl rglmrgl 28.

data.name: By default, bads lose 50 health, misses lose 250 health (at ~100% health).
data.value: Blgrl mrrglub, grrrglrgl rglrglgurg 50 murglargrl, grrrmrgrgl rglrglgurg 250 murglargrl (argl ~100% murglargrl).

data.name: Misses lose LESS health the further beneath 1000 health you are at (at 0 life you would lose 20 health for a miss)
data.value: Grrrmrgrgl rglrglgurg LESS murglargrl mrgl glarargrlrgl glrgl 1000 murglargrl murlg argrlg argl (argl 0 murggrgl murlg mrglargrl rglrglgurg 20 murglargrl mrlgrgl mrg grrrmrg)

data.name: By default at high combo, perfects gain 9.6 life, greats gain 8 life, goods gain 0 life.
data.value: Blgrl mrrglub argl argargrl lrgl, mrglubrgl glorgrgl 9.6 murggrgl, mrrglubrgl glorgrgl 8 murggrgl, glorgarglglar glorgrgl 0 murggrgl.

data.name: This is modified by a multiplier that is almost entirely reset on a miss, and decreased drastically on a bad.
data.value: Mrglrgl argl argrlurgmurggrrr blgrl mrg mrrglrgrl rglmrgl argl brglmrlgrgl blubblgrlmglamrrgl rgrgl urg mrg grrrmrg, mrrgl murglrgllrglmgla rrglrglmrogl urg mrg grrrgl.

data.name: Each perfect or great you get increases the multiplier by a minor amount.
data.value: Mrlgrl mrglub argrlg mrrglub murlg gurg lrgllrglrgrlglarrgl mrgl mrrglrgrl blgrl mrg rulgprglprgl mrrglmurgrgl.

data.name: Effectively, this means that your life gain is heavily affected by combo, reaching maximum gain at ~40-50 combo.
data.value: Blgrlglorgbrgl, mrglrgl argrlrgl rglmrgl murlgrgl murggrgl glorgrgl argl glargrrrglorg brglblgrlplglrgrl blgrl lrgl, urgrulgmrrr mrrrgl glorgrgl argl ~40-50 lrgl.

data.name: To recover from Bads you require 17-21 combo per Bad. Bads typically let you live for 3x as long as misses.
data.value: Rgl blgrlmrlg blgrl Grrrglrgl murlg gurg 17-21 lrgl grgl Grrrgl. Grrrglrgl argllrgl arglgrrrglubrgl murlg mroglgurg mrlgrgl 3urggrrrmrogl argl mrgl argl grrrmrgrgl.

data.name: To remain alive you need to maintain 17-21 combo per Miss.
data.value: Rgl rgl gurgplgl murlg mrogl rgl mroglrglgurgargrl 17-21 lrgl grgl Grrrmrg.

data.name: To remain at 50% visible life, you need 37-46 combo per Miss.
data.value: Rgl rgl argl 50% urggrgl murggrgl, murlg mrogl 37-46 lrgl grgl Grrrmrg.

data.name: To remain at Rainbow Life, you 46-55 combo per Miss.
data.value: Rgl rgl argl Rgl Murggrgl, murlg 46-55 lrgl grgl Grrrmrg.
data.comment: Likely missing "need" between "you" and "46-55" in source; preserved verbatim.

data.name: Bads at low health let you live for roughly 3x as long as misses, this gap increases the higher the life threshold you want to keep, up to misses punishing 6x as much when maintaining 100% visual life.
data.value: Grrrglrgl argl lrgl murglargrl arglgrrrglubrgl murlg mroglgurg mrlgrgl argrlmrrrlrgl 3urggrrrmrogl argl mrgl argl grrrmrgrgl, mrglrgl prglmroglmurg lrgllrglrgrlglarrgl mrgl argargrl mrgl murggrgl grrrmurg murlg plgllrglplglrgl rgl murglargl, glrgl rgl grrrmrgrgl rrglglub 6urggrrrmrogl argl mrrrrrglglrgl arglrgl glarlurgmurg 100% glorgmglaargl murggrgl.

data.name: TLDR: Misses matter less at low life, but are always significantly more punishing than Bads.
data.value: TLDR: Grrrmrgrgl plgl lrrgl argl lrgl murggrgl, blubgl argrlg mrglrglrgl gurgmrlgmrrgl mrrglrgl rrglglub grargrl Grrrglrgl.

data.name: Misses or back-to-back Bads early in a run put you in a terribly position for maintaining life, as they reset your life gain multiplier and require you to combo ~40-50 to regain it. Start runs strong for increased success rates.
data.value: Grrrmrgrgl argrlg mrrgl-rgl-mrrgl Grrrglrgl urgrgl murg mrg prgl rglmurg murlg murg mrg mrrglargrlmglamrrr mroglmrglrglrgl mrlgrgl glarlurgmurg murggrgl, argl glurg rgrgl murlgrgl murggrgl glorgrgl mrrglrgrl mrrgl gurg murlg rgl lrgl ~40-50 rgl mrrglmrrr rgl. Start mrrglglrgl grrrbrgllrgl mrlgrgl mroglgrrrgrglmurgl urgmurglmurg rrglrglrgl.

data.name: When at 12% or lower visual life, a miss gives less life loss than a bad, but inhibits your recovery severely. This only really matters for notes at the end of a song or before guaranteed 100+ combo sections.
data.value: Arglrgl argl 12% argrlg gurgargrlbrgl glorgmglaargl murggrgl, mrg grrrmrg rulgmrgl lrrgl murggrgl grrrglub grargrl mrg grrrgl, blubgl brglmrglgrarurg murlgrgl mrrglubmrg glorgmrrr. Mrglrgl mglrgl mgla mrrrmurgl mrlgrgl mrrglurgrgl argl mrgl glubargl glub mrg glurgl argrlg glrgl murgbrgllrglrulg 100+ lrgl murgblgrlglrglglub.

data.name: Try to maintain 17-21 combo per bad.
data.value: Arglgr rgl mroglrglgurgargrl 17-21 lrgl grgl grrrgl.

data.name: Try to maintain 40-50 combo per miss.
data.value: Arglgr rgl mroglrglgurgargrl 40-50 lrgl grgl grrrmrg.

data.name: Lifebars are weird.
data.comment: Quote attributed to Zelllooo on the Life Calculator page.

data.name: Team Infinitesimal, data-mine from NX2 + Prime
data.value: Glubgrarmurg Glorgrglglrgl, glubglrgl-glarbrgl blgrl NX2 + Rulg

data.name: Some players already maintain scores via Spreadsheets.
data.value: Grgl murglargrlrgl glrgl mroglrglgurgargrl grglrglrgl murgllurgglrgl Glubglrglrglrgl.

data.name: In some of those cases, it may be faster to upload a Spreadsheet instead of manually inputting thousands of grades.
data.value: Murg grgl glub rglmrglrgl glorgmrrrgurg, rgl mglar brgl arglbrgl rgl murlgrgl mrg Glubglrglrgl gurgrrgl glub murgplgl urggrglrgrl urgmurgl glub grglarglrgl.

data.name: After the upload, if there are some rows/charts/attempts that did not upload correctly, you will be given the option to download a list of the failed rows and the reason they failed.
data.value: Mrgl mrgl murlgrgl, arglgl argrlrrgl argrlg grgl rgrlmrlgmrrrrgl/mrglrglrgl/lrglglargurgblgrlrgl rglmrgl mrggl grrrgl murlgrgl arglmrgl, murlg mrgl brgl mrglrgrl mrgl mglaglrglprgl rgl murlgrgl mrg glrglmrg glub mrgl grrrglrglrgl rgrlmrlgmrrrrgl mrrgl mrgl mrrglargl glurg grrrglrglrgl.

data.name: Spreadsheet is uploading and being processed...
data.value: Glubglrglrgl argl arglrgrlglorgrgl mrrgl brglrgl urgrgrlmroglmrrgl...

data.name: XXLetterGrade
data.comment: Column header on the XX-score upload preview grid; matches the legacy property name.

data.name: IsBroken
data.comment: Column header on the XX-score upload preview grid; matches the legacy property name.

data.name: If you leave this page or cancel, the upload will stop but you will not lose any scores that have already been recorded from your upload.
data.value: Arglgl murlg blgrlargl mrglrgl murgbagl argrlg grrrmrg, mrgl murlgrgl mrgl mglamrrrgrrrrgl blubgl murlg mrgl grrrgl rglrglgurg argrgl grglrglrgl rglmrgl magrgl glrgl brglgl gurgmgla blgrl murlgrgl murlgrgl.

data.name: X/Y Uploaded. Z Remaining. W Failed to record
data.comment: Save progress status. {0}=saved count, {1}=total, {2}=time remaining (m:ss), {3}=failed count

data.name: You had a few charts that were not able to be downloaded. You can download a CSV of the failures to make adjustments and try again.
data.value: Murlg magr mrg grgl mrglrglrgl rglmrgl mrglargl grrrgl blgrlmrrrglrgl rgl brgl glrglmurgblub. Murlg glargrl murlgrgl mrg CSV glub mrgl grrrglrglrgl rgl mrgla prglmrogl mrrgl arglgr plglglarplgl.

data.name: All charts you uploaded were successfully updated!
data.value: Glrgl mrglrglrgl murlg prglglubargrl mrglargl lurgurgrrgl mrglargrl!

data.name: You somehow ended up in a state between realities. Refresh the page to try again.
data.value: Murlg glubrgl rglgrgl glrgl murg mrg rglargl murggrl prglglarrulg. Mrrglurg mrgl murgbagl rgl arglgr plglglarplgl.

data.name: Some adjustments to account for typos or difference in naming conventions have been accounted for. Song Names are Case Insensitive. (Note that some of these look the same because they are whitespace adjustments)
data.value: Grgl prglmrogl rgl mrrglargrl mrlgrgl grarglorgglubrgl argrlg grarplglrgrl murg rulgargrl mrrrmrlg magrgl brglgl glubbrglrrglargl mrlgrgl. Glurgl Mrglargrgl argrlg Mrglmrrr Glrglblubrgl. (Mrrglurg rglmrgl grgl glub mrglrglrgl rulgprgl mrgl mglargrl mrrglrgl glurg argrlg mglamrrglglrgl prglmrogl)

data.name: File cannot be larger than 10 MB
data.value: Gluburg grrrglrgl brgl mrrgrgl grargrl 10 MB

data.name: There was an unknown error while parsing the file
data.value: Argrlrrgl mragl mrg urglrgl grrrargrl murgll grargurglurgrgl mrgl gluburg

data.name: Wouldn't You Like To Know
data.comment: Easter-egg tooltip shown for the user "CLEARALL18SORQUIT"

data.name: Site constructed and maintained by DrMurloc
data.value: Urgmrg plglglubargl mrrgl glarrulgargrlrgl blgrl DrMurloc

data.name: Original Concept (excel score tracking) Constructed by KyleTT
data.value: Mrlggrglargl Arglglub (mrrglurggrgl grglrgl brglrulgrgl) Plglglubargl blgrl KyleTT

data.name: LetterDifficulties
data.comment: Page title on /Experiments/LetterDifficulties; the source has no space between "Letter" and "Difficulties".

data.name: Private User - X
data.comment: {0} = comparison-score number. Listed for users who have set their profile private.

data.name: ChartScoring
data.comment: Page title on /Experiments/ChartScoring; the source has no space between "Chart" and "Scoring".

data.name: All players with scores within the target folder are assigned weights based on how close their competitive level is to X.
data.value: Glrgl murglargrlrgl grgl grglrglrgl murgargrl mrgl mrglargrl glubmurg argrlg brglrulgmurglblub glubgrgrlrgl grarrgl urg grarrgrl grlorgl glurgrgl grrrmrrglmrg rglmrgl argl rgl {0}.

data.name: Highlighted players have a recorded score on the chart in question.
data.value: Murglmroglrgl murglargrlrgl magrgl mrg gurgmgla grglrgl urg mrgl mrglrgl murg mrrgl?.

data.name: Anonymous
data.comment: Display name shown for users who have set their profile private.

data.name: Competitively
data.comment: Word used in player-weight rows on /Experiments/ChartScoring (e.g. "(Competitively 12.34)").

data.name: The target folder and the three surrounding are provided weighted average scores utilizing the player weights above.
data.value: Mrgl mrglargrl glubmurg mrrgl mrgl mrrrgl argrlrgl argrlg glubmrrgl blubgurg mrrglmrg grglrglrgl mrrglgurgmrglmrgl mrgl murglargrl glubgrgrlrgl argargrl.

data.name: These averages are shifted away from the level in question by .5 of a standard deviation within their respective folder to make sure level changes are better represented by the bulk of a surrounding folder.
data.value: Mrglrglrgl mrrglmrgrgl argrlg mglamrgl murgblgrl blgrl mrgl rglmrgl murg mrrgl? blgrl .5 glub mrg lrglmrglmrrr argrlplglargrl murgargrl glurgrgl blgrlargl glubmurg rgl mrgla prgl rglmrgl mrglargrlrgl argrlg urgmrrr plgllrglgrrrgrar blgrl mrgl mrrrgurg glub mrg argrlrgl glubmurg.

data.name: The chart in question has its weighted average score projected onto the score distributions
data.value: Mrgl mrglrgl murg mrrgl? magrgl rglrgl blubgurg mrrglmrg grglrgl mrrglurg mrgl mrgl grglrgl glubmrrglrglrgl

data.name: There was not enough data for the targeted player level to evaluate a final difficulty.
data.value: Argrlrrgl mragl grrrgl plglmglaglrgl glubglrgl mrlgrgl mrgl rrglblgrlmrglmrrgl murglargrl rglmrgl rgl rglrrgl mrg mrrglub grlgrgl.

data.name: The weighted average for this chart is better than the average for a X.
data.value: Mrgl blubgurg mrrglmrg mrlgrgl mrglrgl mrglrgl argl urgmrrr grargrl mrgl mrrglmrg mrlgrgl mrg {0}.

data.name: In this case, the chart is determined to be below by X utilizing standard deviations in the Y folder.
data.value: Murg mrglrgl mrglmrrr, mrgl mrglrgl argl urggurgprglbrgl rgl brgl blubgrl blgrl {0} mrrglgurgmrglmrgl lrglmrglmrrr mrglargrl murg mrgl {1} glubmurg.

data.name: The weighted average for this chart is worst than the average for a X.
data.value: Mrgl blubgurg mrrglmrg mrlgrgl mrglrgl mrglrgl argl grrrglubgl grargrl mrgl mrrglmrg mrlgrgl mrg {0}.
data.comment: Source spelling preserved verbatim ("worst" rather than "worse"). {0} = low-level integer.

data.name: In this case, the chart is determined to be above by X utilizing standard deviations in the Y folder.
data.value: Murg mrglrgl mrglmrrr, mrgl mrglrgl argl urggurgprglbrgl rgl brgl argargrl blgrl {0} mrrglgurgmrglmrgl lrglmrglmrrr mrglargrl murg mrgl {1} glubmurg.

data.name: Determined to be X between Y and Z

At this point, it's identified that this chart has no players with a weight of .5 or higher (within 1 level). The chart is marked as not having a scoring level as any estimation would be based on missing data.
data.value: Argl mrglrgl glubgrgl, rglrgl glrglargl rglmrgl mrglrgl mrglrgl magrgl grrrgl murglargrlrgl grgl mrg glubgrgrl glub .5 argrlg argargrl (murgargrl 1 rglmrgl). Mrgl mrglrgl argl mrogl argl grrrgl blgrl mrg grglrglmrg rglmrgl argl argrgl grglprglmrglmrgl mrglargrl brgl grarrgl urg grrrmrg glubglrgl.

data.name: The listed scoring difficulty is calculated for players competitively playing in the officially listed folder for a chart.
data.value: Mrgl mrrrrulg grglrglmrg grlgrgl argl blgrlblgrlplgllrgl mrlgrgl murglargrlrgl blgrlmurglblubmrrrrgl brgllrgl murg mrgl argrlmrrrgrglmrlg mrrrrulg glubmurg mrlgrgl mrg mrglrgl.

data.name: The outcome of this algorithm has drastically different results for players at different levels though
data.value: Mrgl lrglmrlgargl glub mrglrgl mrrglglub magrgl rrglrglmrogl argrglrgl grglubrgl mrlgrgl murglargrlrgl argl argrglrgl rulg mglargl

data.name: This is intended. There are charts that are relatively easier to score to others in the folder for players just pushing into the folder, but are harder for higher level players to perfect.
data.value: Mrglrgl argl argrlglrgl. Argrlrrgl argrlg mrglrglrgl rglmrgl argrlg mrglglubgrgl mrrglrgl rgl grglrgl rgl argrglrgl murg mrgl glubmurg mrlgrgl murglargrlrgl gurglrgl lrglplglgrrr gluburgglorg mrgl glubmurg, blubgl argrlg grrrmrrglrgl mrlgrgl argargrl rglmrgl murglargrlrgl rgl mrglub.

data.name: Scoring Level by Player Competitive Level
data.value: Grglrglmrg Rglmrgl blgrl Murglargrl Grrrmrrglmrg Rglmrgl

data.name: For CoOps, scoring level is simply the lowest level player who's been able to pass the chart.
data.value: Mrlgrgl Mrrglurgrgl, grglrglmrg rglmrgl argl grarrrglblub mrgl lrglrgl rglmrgl murglargrl argl brglgl blgrlmrrrglrgl rgl brglurg mrgl mrglrgl.

data.name: This isn't perfect, but until I have more data other algorithms haven't been successful at projecting CoOps onto difficulty levels
data.value: Mrglrgl glrglmrlg mrglub, blubgl urglrgl Mrg magrgl mrrglrgl glubglrgl argrgl mrrglglubrgl blgrlgrglgrrr brglgl mglalrgl argl mrlgmrrr Mrrglurgrgl mrgl grlgrgl rulg

data.name: No one has passed this CoOp yet so no level is assigned.
data.value: Grrrgl mrg magrgl brglurgrgl mrglrgl Mrrglurg rrglrulglrgl mogrl grrrgl rglmrgl argl brglrulgmurglblub.

data.name: This gives this chart a scoring level of: X
data.value: Mrglrgl rulgmrgl mrglrgl mrglrgl mrg grglrglmrg rglmrgl glub: {0}
data.comment: {0} = lowest passing player's competitive level (2 decimals).

data.name: As
data.comment: Plural of letter grade A — column header counting A grades.

data.name: Score Rankings (the colored scores) are based on comparisons to similarly skilled players.
data.value: Grglrgl Grglarglrglrgl (mrgl argrlglar grglrglrgl) argrlg grarrgl urg murglplglargrlrgrl rgl rulggurggrgl brglmrogl murglargrlrgl.

data.name: The higher percent of players in your range that you perform better than, the better the color:
data.value: Mrgl argargrl mrrglargl glub murglargrlrgl murg murlgrgl murgargrl rglmrgl murlg mrrglbrglrgl urgmrrr grargrl, mrgl urgmrrr mrgl glarblub:

data.name: Similarly skilled players to you for Singles:
data.value: Rulggurggrgl brglmrogl murglargrlrgl rgl murlg mrlgrgl Mrglargrlrgl:

data.name: Similarly skilled players to you for Doubles (CoOp charts use doubles competitive level):
data.value: Rulggurggrgl brglmrogl murglargrlrgl rgl murlg mrlgrgl Argrlargl (Mrrglurg mrglrglrgl urgmrg argrlargl grrrmrrglmrg rglmrgl):

data.name: Always
data.comment: Fallback for tournament StartDate when not set.

data.name: Never
data.comment: Fallback for tournament EndDate when not set.

data.name: Start Date: X
data.comment: {0} = formatted date string or the localized "Always" fallback.

data.name: End Date: X
data.comment: {0} = formatted date string or the localized "Never" fallback.

data.name: Players have X to play charts. You are allowed to finish the song you are on when your time runs out. Your total score is total combined score of all charts you play.
data.value: Murglargrlrgl magrgl {0} rgl plargl mrglrglrgl. Murlg argrlg glrglmglarrgl rgl mrrglubgl mrgl glurgl murlg argrlg urg arglrgl murlgrgl murgll mrrglglrgl grglglrglblgrlrgl. Murlgrgl glrglmrrgl grglrgl argl glrglmrrgl mrrglglub grglrgl glub glrgl mrglrglrgl murlg plargl.

data.name: Broken scores get a multiplier of X
data.value: Brglubrgl grglrglrgl gurg mrg mrrglrgrl glub {0}

data.name: Songs will have score adjusted based on song length (treating 2 minutes as baseline)
data.value: Glurglrgl mrgl magrgl grglrgl prglmroglmrogl grarrgl urg glurgl lrglurg (lurgrulglrglglrgl 2 murgllrgl argl glubargl)

data.name: are
data.comment: Used in "Repeated charts {are/are not} allowed." sentence on the rules dialog.

data.name: are not
data.comment: Used in "Repeated charts {are/are not} allowed." sentence on the rules dialog.

data.name: Repeated charts X allowed.
data.comment: {0} = "are" or "are not" (also localized as separate keys).

data.name: Players (Paste UserId from Account Page if not Public)
data.value: Murglargrlrgl (Prargl UserId blgrl Mrrglargrl Murgbagl arglgl grrrgl Arglmrrgl)

data.name: This user does not exist. Double check the User Id
data.value: Mrglrgl murglar mrgrgl grrrgl mrrglgrar. Murgrgrl grglarglglar mrgl Murglar ID

data.name: X Charts
data.comment: {0} = chart count integer. Button label on /Tournament/Stamina/{id}.

data.name: Adjust Scores to Song Duration (uses 2 minutes as average chart duration)
data.value: Glrglmrg Grglrglrgl rgl Glurgl Murgllrgl (urgmrgrgl 2 murgllrgl argl mrrglmrg mrglrgl murgllrgl)

data.name: Continous Modifier Scale (modifier increments between letter grades)
data.value: Prglgurg Mrrglblub Grarrgl (mrrglblub arglglorgglrgl murggrl lrglargl grglarglrgl)
data.comment: Source spelling preserved verbatim ("Continous" rather than "Continuous").

data.name: Perfect Score Modifier (Acts as a letter grade beyond SSS+)
data.value: Mrglub Grglrgl Mrrglblub (Mrglplgl argl mrg lrglargl grglargl urgmrrr SSS+)

data.name: Player To Test (Must Be Set To Public)
data.value: Murglargrl Rgl Grrgl (Mrrrgl Brgl Argl Rgl Arglmrrgl)

data.name: Road to BITE (Monthly Leaderboard July 8th - August 4th)
data.value: Glubrulgblub rgl BITE (Murgllargl Arglmrgl Rulg 8rglrgrlplgl - Mrrrbluburg 4rglrgrlplgl)
data.comment: Date-window heading used pre-BITE; specific to a fixed annual event window.

data.name: Co-Op
data.comment: Used as a select-item label on /WeeklyCharts. Distinct from the existing "CoOp" key (no hyphen) used elsewhere — both spellings appear in source verbatim.

data.name: What Should I Play
data.comment: Page title (no question mark in source).

data.name: What Should I Play?
data.comment: h3 header on the same page (with question mark in source).

data.name: Top 50 X
data.comment: {0} = chart type (e.g. "Singles" / "Doubles"). Tooltip on the crown icon for top-50 charts.

data.name: I Just Want to Hide The Chart
data.value: Mrg Gurglrgl Plgllrglplglrgl rgl Glubgrl Mrgl Mrglrgl

data.name: The Category Isn't Interesting to Me'
data.value: Mrgl Glargrl Glrglmrlg Murglmroglplgl rgl Mrgmrg'
data.comment: Source has a stray trailing apostrophe — preserved verbatim.

data.name: You can sign in to your account with any connected method
data.value: Mrgl grrblub aaaughibbrgubugbugrguburgle mrgl mrgl blub

data.name: You will no longer be able to sign in with this method
This is your only sign-in method and cannot be disconnected
This sign-in method is already connected to your account
This sign-in method is connected to a different account
Your username and password are sent directly to piugame.com and are never stored
data.value: Mrglname uuua shhhcret grrl piugame.com blub blub, nk mrgglkeep aaaughibbrgubugbugrguburgle

data.name: Could not reach PIUGAME, try again later
data.value: PIUGAME nk mrgl! Rwlrwlrwl blub later

data.name: PIUGAME logins depend on piugame.com being reachable, connect a backup sign-in method
data.value: PIUGAME mrgl-mrgl blub piugame.com uuua! Grrblub backup mrgl-mrgl aaaughibbrgubugbugrguburgle!

data.name: Choose the account to merge with
Sign in with one of that account's methods to prove it's yours
data.value: Mrgl-mrgl uuua RwlRwl grrblub, mrgl uuua blub!

data.name: That PIUGAME account is not connected to the selected account
data.value: PIUGAME mrglccount nk RwlRwl mrglccount blub

data.name: All sign-in methods will work on the account you keep, the other account's data is deleted after 30 days
data.value: Mrgl grrblubs blub keep-mrglccount! RwlRwl mrglccount mrgggl 30 mrgldays aaaughibbrgubugbugrguburgle

data.name: Type the name of the account being deleted to confirm
data.value: Mrgltype mrglname uuua mrgggl-mrglccount blub confirm

data.name: You kept the other account, log in again to continue
data.value: Mrgl keep RwlRwl mrglccount! Mrgl-mrgl again blub

data.name: Merged account data is deleted on
This sign-in method belongs to another account, you can merge the two accounts
data.value: Mrgl grrblub uuua RwlRwl mrglccount! Mrgl smoosh blub blub

data.name: An account with game tag {0} already exists, is that you?
data.value: Mrglccount mrgl gametag {0} uuua blub! Mrgl uuua?

data.name: Phoenix 2 titles have not been revealed yet. Check back after launch!
data.value: Phoenix 2 mrgltitles glub not mrglvealed. Mrgl back after mrgllaunch!

data.name: Phoenix 2 official leaderboards are coming soon.
Your account is not associated with a game profile yet. Play a game on your account first, then try again.
data.value: Mrgl account is not mrglsociated with a game profile yet. Mrgl a game on mrgl account first, then mrgl again.

data.name: Upload a JSON file to create Phoenix 2 songs and charts in bulk.
data.value: Mrglupload a JSON mrglfile to murglar Phoenix 2 mrglsongs and mrglcharts in mrglbulk!

data.name: File is too large — 5 MB max.
Already exists in the Phoenix 2 catalog — will be skipped.
data.value: Mrglready mrglexists in the Phoenix 2 mrglcatalog — mrgl be mrglskipped.

data.name: Exists in the Phoenix catalog — carried-over name collision, verify this is intentional.
data.value: Mrglexists in the Phoenix mrglcatalog — mrgl-over name mrgllision, mrglrify this is mrgltentional.

data.name: Image could not be copied to the CDN — source URL stored, rehost manually.
data.value: Mrglimage could not mrgl to the CDN — mrglsource URL mrglstored, mrglhost mrglually!

data.name: Score history begins with journaling (June 2026) — older plays aren't shown.

data.value: Mrgl mrgl recap mrrgl... mrgl soon.

data.value: Some mrgl artists mrgled wrong. Mrgl.

data.name: Score Ranking: What percent of players of comparable (+/- .5 competitive level) your score is on a chart.

data.name: Select a key, pick the chart it belongs to, then bind
data.value: Selrgct a krgy, prgck the chrgrt it belrgngs to, thrgn brgnd

data.name: A snapshot zip imports a fetched data release directly - same pipeline as the crawl, no fetching
data.value: A snapshrgt zip imprgrts a fetched data relrgse directly - same pipelrgn as the crrgwl, no fetchrgn, mrgl

data.name: There was an error uploading the snapshot
data.value: There was an errgr uplrgding the snapshrgt, mrgl

data.name: This page isn't ready for older mixes yet
data.value: This page isn't ready for older mixes yet

data.name: Active — {0} scores nearby, {1} skills have enough evidence
data.value: Mrglctive — {0} scores nearby, {1} mrglskills have enough mrglvidence

data.name: Every chart you've scored within 3 folders votes on your skills — closer folders and bigger skill coverage count more.
data.value: Every mrglrgl you've scored within 3 mrglfolders votes on your mrglskills — closer mrglfolders and bigger mrglcoverage count mrglmore.

data.name: How each skill runs against your own average
data.value: How each mrglskill runs against your own mrglverage

data.name: Players within one competitive level of you — closer players count more, and so do those whose folder ratings agree with yours.
data.value: Mrglplayers within one grrrmrrgl level of you — closer mrglplayers count more, mrgl mrgl!

data.name: Same skills, two questions: this folder view asks how the charts you've played here actually go — the blend view asks which skills run hot or cold across everything you've scored nearby. A skill can look fine here and still move charts.
data.value: Same mrglskills, two mrglquestions: this mrglfolder view asks how your mrglrglrgl go — the mrglblend view asks which mrglskills run hot or cold mrglnearby. Mrgl!

data.name: Silent — no players found in your competitive range yet.
data.value: Mrglsilent — no mrglplayers found in your grrrmrrgl range yet. Mrgl.

data.name: Silent — only {0} skills have enough evidence. Your list currently matches the community's. Score more charts near this folder to turn this on.
data.value: Mrglsilent — only {0} mrglskills have enough mrglvidence. Your mrgllist matches the mrglmunity's. Score more mrglrglrgl nearby! Mrgl!

data.name: The shared tier list for this folder, built from everyone's data.
data.value: The shared mrgllist for this mrglfolder, built from everyone's mrgldata.

data.name: Three sources vote on every chart. Sources with more weight move charts further.
data.value: Three mrglsources vote on every mrglrgl. Heavier mrglsources move mrglrglrgl further.

data.name: Two views of the same skills. The left one feeds the blend above; the right one is this folder as Folder Stats shows it.
data.value: Two mrglviews of the same mrglskills. Left feeds the mrglblend; right is this mrglfolder as Mrglfolder Stats shows it.

data.name: Vs. Peers: how your scores rank against players of similar competitive level, averaged over this folder's charts featuring the skill. Greyed skills don't have enough evidence to vote yet.
data.value: Vs. Mrglpeers: how your mrglscores rank against similar grrrmrrgl mrglplayers, averaged over this mrglfolder's mrglrglrgl featuring the mrglskill. Grey mrglskills need more mrglvidence. Mrgl!

data.name: Where your list disagrees with the community's, and the skills that pushed it. Tap a chart for its full source breakdown.
data.value: Where your mrgllist disagrees with the mrglmunity's, and the mrglskills that pushed it. Mrgltap a mrglrgl for its full mrglbreakdown.

data.name: Your ability on the charts you've played here — the same numbers as Folder Stats
data.value: Your mrglbility on the mrglrglrgl you've played here — same mrglnumbers as Mrglfolder Stats

data.name: Your list currently matches the community's on every rated chart.
data.value: Your mrgllist currently matches the mrglmunity's on every rated mrglrgl. Mrgl!

data.value: Your mrglsonalized list moves {0} of {1} mrglrglrgl away from the mrglmunity's.

data.value: {0} don't have enough mrgldata to move

data.name: Score tracking for Pump It Up
data.value: Mrglscrgl trglckrng mrgl Pump It Up

data.name: PIU Scores keeps your whole Pump It Up history, imported straight from your PIUGAME account, and turns it into tier lists, rankings, and recommendations tuned to how you actually play.
data.value: PIU Scores mrglrps mrgl whrgl Pump It Up hrglstrgl, mrglprtd strglght frgl mrgl PIUGAME accrglnt, mrgl trglns mrgl mrgl Brglurgbrgl Rglgurggurgrgl, rrglnkngs, mrgl rrglcmmndrgltns trglnd mrgl hrgl mrgl mrglly plrgly.

data.name: Free, and built by a player.
data.value: Frgle, mrgl bmrglt brgl mrgl plrglyr.

data.name: New here? Signing in creates your account automatically — no forms, no site password.
data.value: Nrglw hrgl? Srglgnrng mrgln crrgltes mrgl accrglnt mrglutmrgltcrglly — nrgl frglms, nrgl srglte prglsswrgld.

data.name: PIUGAME sign-in goes directly to piugame.com — your password is never stored or logged here.
data.value: PIUGAME srglgn-mrgln grgls drglrctly mrgl piugame.com — mrgl prglsswrgld mrgl nrglvr strglrd mrgl lrglggd hrglre.

data.name: Already have an account? Any sign-in method you've linked works — and you can link more from your Account page.
data.value: Mrglrdy hrglv mrgl accrglnt? Mrglny srglgn-mrgln mrglthrgld mrgl lrglnkd wrglks — mrgl mrgl crgln lrglnk mrglre frglm mrgl Accrglnt prglge.

data.name: Everything below is live site data — the actual product, not screenshots.
data.value: Mrglvrythng brglw mrgl lrglve srglte drglta — mrgl mrglctrgl prgldrglct, nrglt scrglnshrglts.

data.name: Difficulty bands computed from the community's real pass and score data — recalculated as scores come in, not argued into a wiki.
data.value: Drglffrglclty brglnds cmrglptrgld frglm mrgl cmrglmrglnrglty's rrgll prglss mrgl scrgle drglta — rrglcrglclrgltd mrgls scrgls crglme mrgln, nrglt mrglrgurgld mrglntrgl mrgl wrglkrgl.

data.name: One shared board, one week — everyone posts their best on the same charts.
data.value: Mrgl shrglrd brglrd, mrgl wrglk — mrglvrglyrglne prglsts thrglr brglst mrgln mrgl srglme chrglrts.

data.name: Point it at your PIUGAME account once — grades, plates, and history land intact.
data.value: Prglnt mrglt mrglt mrgl PIUGAME accrglnt mrglnce — grrglds, plrglts, mrgl hrglstrgl lrglnd mrglntrglct.

data.name: Session roundup captured on the way in — a new UG plate, 2 PBs, one folder lamp.
data.value: Srglssn rrglndrglp crglptrgld mrgln mrgl wrgly mrgln — mrgl nrglw UG plrglte, 2 PBs, mrgl frgldrgl lrglmp.

data.name: Pumbility rating, titles, and a season recap worth screenshotting.
data.value: Pumbility rrgltrglng, trgltls, mrgl mrgl srglsn rrglcrglp wrglrth scrglnshrgltng.

data.name: Browse every title — no account needed
data.value: Brglwse mrglvrgl trgltle — nrgl accrglnt nrgldrgld

data.name: Make it your home base — and run your scene from it.
data.value: Mrglke mrglt mrgl hrglme brglse — mrgl rrgln mrgl scrglne frglm mrglt.

data.name: Pick your widgets — projections, the weekly board, your daily step — and arrange your own dashboard. Your home page, your call.
data.value: Prglck mrgl wrgldgrglts — prgljrglctns, mrgl wrglkly brglrd, mrgl drglly strglp — mrgl mrglrrrglnge mrgl mrglwn drglshbrglrd. Mrgl hrglme prglge, mrgl crglll.

data.name: Roll charts with the randomizer, run brackets and card drafts at your local, and share a live view so the whole venue — or the stream — can follow the round.
data.value: Rrglll chrglrts wrglth mrgl rrglndmrglzrgl, rrgln brglckrglts mrgl crglrd drglfts mrglt mrgl lrglcrgl, mrgl shrglre mrgl lrglve vrglw srgl mrgl whrgle vrglnrgle — mrgl mrgl strglm — crgln frgllrglw mrgl rrglnd.

data.name: Post qualifier scores for community tournaments right from the site, and take on March of Murlocs — the site-run stamina session series. More formats on the way.
data.value: Prglst qrgllrglfrgl scrgls frgl cmrglmrglnrglty trglrnmrglnts rrglght frglm mrgl srglte, mrgl trglke mrgln MRGLRCH MRGL MRGLRLRGLCS — mrgl srglte-rrgln strglmrglnrgl srglssn srglrs. MRGLGLGLGL! Mrglre frglmrglts mrgln mrgl wrgly.

data.name: Point your community's channel at the bot and placements, milestones, and session highlights land in your server the moment scores come in.
data.value: Prglnt mrgl cmrglmrglnrglty's chrglnnrgl mrglt mrgl brglt mrgl plrglcmrglnts, mrgllstrglns, mrgl srglssn hrglghlrglts lrglnd mrgln mrgl srglrvrgl mrgl mrglmrglnt scrgls crglme mrgln.

data.name: Session roundup — 3 highlights: new UG plate, 2 PBs. Weekly board: up to 2nd place.
data.value: Srglssn rrglndrglp — 3 hrglghlrglts: nrglw UG plrglte, 2 PBs. Wrglkly brglrd: mrglp mrgl 2nd plrglce.

data.name: This is community infrastructure, not a data silo.
data.value: Thrgls mrgls cmrglmrglnrglty mrglnfrrglstrrglctrgl, nrglt mrgl drglta srgllrgl.

data.name: When a new mix arrives, nothing here resets. Every score you've recorded stays — to look back on, compare against, and build from. {0} mixes on record, side by side, 1999 to today.
data.value: Whrgln mrgl nrglw mrglx mrglrrrglvs, nrglthng hrglre rrglsrglts. Mrglvrgl scrgle mrgl'vrgl rrglcrgldrgld strglys — mrgl lrglk brglck mrgln, cmrglprglre mrglgrglnst, mrgl brglld frglm. {0} mrglxrgls mrgln rrglcrgld, srglde brgl srglde, 1999 mrgl trgldrgly.

data.name: Your scores stay yours to show. They power the aggregate analysis behind the tier lists, but your name and history are never public unless you switch them on.
data.value: Mrgl scrgls strgly mrgls mrgl shrglw. Thrgly prglwrgl mrgl mrglggrrglgrglte mrglnrgllrglss brglhnd mrgl Brglurgbrgl Rglgurggurgrgl, brglt mrgl nrglme mrgl hrglstrgl mrgl nrglvrgl prglblrglc mrglnlrglss mrgl swrgltch thrglm mrgln.

data.name: Download every score you've ever recorded, any time, in one click. No lock-in, no hoarding — if you ever want to leave, your history leaves with you.
data.value: Drglwnlrgld mrglvrgl scrgle mrgl'vrgl mrglvrgl rrglcrgldrgld, mrglny trglme, mrgln mrgl clrglck. Nrgl lrglck-mrgln, nrgl hrglrdng — mrglf mrgl mrglvrgl wrglnt mrgl lrglve, mrgl hrglstrgl lrglvs wrglth mrgl.

data.name: A public API with full docs powers community-made tools — bots, overlays, stat sites. Grab a token from your account and build on the same data we use.
data.value: Mrgl prglblrglc API wrglth frglll drglcs prglwrgls cmrglmrglnrglty-mrglde trglols — brglts, mrglvrgllrglys, strglt srgltrgls. Grrglb mrgl trglkrgln frglm mrgl mrglccrglnt mrgl brglld mrgln mrgl srglme drglta wrgl mrglse.

data.value: One configurable graph of your scores, grades, plates, or clears by level.

data.name: Score spread per level — min, quartiles, max, with the IQR shaded.
data.value: Score spread per level — min, quartiles, max, with the IQR shaded.

data.name: What grades fill each folder, normalized so shape beats volume.
data.value: What grades fill each folder, normalized so shape beats volume.

data.name: Chasing plates — % of each folder at MG, UG, and full Perfect Game.
data.value: Chasing plates — % of each folder at MG, UG, and full Perfect Game.

data.name: How much of every folder you've passed, Singles vs Doubles.
data.value: How much of every folder you've passed, Singles vs Doubles.

data.name: How each folder's plates stack up — Marvelous, Ultimate, and Perfect Game.
data.value: How each folder's plates stack up — Marvelous, Ultimate, and Perfect Game.

data.name: How much of every folder you've cleared, per level.
data.value: How much of every folder you've cleared, per level.

data.name: How each folder stacks up by score tier: ≥950k, ≥990k, and 1,000,000.
data.value: How each folder stacks up by score tier: ≥950k, ≥990k, and 1,000,000.

data.name: How much of every folder you've cleared, Singles vs Doubles.
data.value: How much of every folder you've cleared, Singles vs Doubles.

data.name: How stale your scores are per folder — the spread of days since you set them.
data.value: How stale your scores are per folder — the spread of days since you set them.

data.name: Your score spread per level, Singles against Doubles, the middle 50% shaded.
data.value: Your score spread per level, Singles against Doubles, the middle 50% shaded.

data.name: Every grade stacked per folder, with a broken / unplayed cap for the folder count.
data.value: Every grade stacked per folder, with a broken / unplayed cap for the folder count.

data.name: Every plate stacked per folder, with a broken / unplayed cap for the folder count.
data.value: Every plate stacked per folder, with a broken / unplayed cap for the folder count.

data.name: How many co-op charts you've cleared, by player count.
data.value: How many co-op charts you've cleared, by player count.

data.name: Remember my password on this device
data.value: Remember my password on this device

data.name: Couldn't unlock your saved password. Enter it to import.
data.value: Couldn't unlock your saved password. Enter it to import.

data.name: All saved credentials have been cleared.
data.value: All saved credentials have been cleared.

data.name: Deletes every saved import password on every device. Users re-enter on their next import. Use if you suspect a breach.
data.value: Deletes every saved import password on every device. Users re-enter on their next import. Use if you suspect a breach.

data.name: For the technically curious — how it actually works
data.value: For the technically curious — how it actually works

data.name: Reading it takes three things at once, held in three different places:
data.value: Reading it takes three things at once, held in three different places:

data.name: on this device only. Useless on its own.
data.value: on this device only. Useless on its own.

data.name: in our database, locked so it can't be opened alone.
data.value: in our database, locked so it can't be opened alone.

data.name: locked in a vault inside Microsoft Azure.
data.value: locked in a vault inside Microsoft Azure.

data.name: Turning this on is like writing your password on a sticky note you keep in your own pocket — except the note is in a code nobody can read by looking at it, not even us.
data.value: Turning this on is like writing your password on a sticky note you keep in your own pocket — except the note is in a code nobody can read by looking at it, not even us.

data.name: All three come together only for the split second you press Import — we decode it, log in for you, and immediately forget it. Your real password is never written down anywhere.
data.value: All three come together only for the split second you press Import — we decode it, log in for you, and immediately forget it. Your real password is never written down anywhere.

data.name: Because a coded copy of your password lives on this device, please make sure your Pump It Up password is one you use only here — not the one that also opens your email or your bank.
data.value: Because a coded copy of your password lives on this device, please make sure your Pump It Up password is one you use only here — not the one that also opens your email or your bank.

data.name: Enter your piugame login once. It's encrypted on this device the moment you press Store — we never keep a readable copy.
data.value: Enter your piugame login once. It's encrypted on this device the moment you press Store — we never keep a readable copy.

data.name: Your username and password are sealed together with AES-256-GCM under a random data key. That data key is wrapped by a master key that never leaves Azure Key Vault.
data.value: Your username and password are sealed together with AES-256-GCM under a random data key. That data key is wrapped by a master key that never leaves Azure Key Vault.

data.name: The ciphertext lives in your browser; the wrapped key lives in our database; the master key lives in Key Vault. Decryption needs all three — a dump of any one, or any two, yields nothing. No password is ever written to our database or logs.
data.value: The ciphertext lives in your browser; the wrapped key lives in our database; the master key lives in Key Vault. Decryption needs all three — a dump of any one, or any two, yields nothing. No password is ever written to our database or logs.

data.name: This is not zero-knowledge: because the login runs on our server, we can technically decrypt your credential at the moment you import. We don't log or keep it — but you are trusting us with the same access we already have on every manual import.
data.value: This is not zero-knowledge: because the login runs on our server, we can technically decrypt your credential at the moment you import. We don't log or keep it — but you are trusting us with the same access we already have on every manual import.

data.name: Also send imported scores to PIU Tracker, a community score site.
data.value: Also send imported scores to PIU Tracker, a community score site.

data.name: PIU Tracker is fully public — scores you send there are public even if your profile isn't.
data.value: PIU Tracker is fully public — scores you send there are public even if your profile isn't.

data.name: Most clears stall below {0} — the steepest step on this board.
Scores open up around competitive level {0}.
Sustained — it holds you under tension for most of its runtime.
Passes cluster between competitive levels {0} and {1}.
Plays a level easier than its label
Very easy to pass for its level
Easy to pass for its level
Hard to pass for its level
Very hard to pass for its level
Plays a level harder than its label
generous to score once you're through
stingy to score even when passed
Not enough data yet to name similar charts — the graph rebuilds nightly.
data.value: Mrgl no datarlgl — mrgl nightly rebuildrgl!

data.name: No score yet — record your first attempt and this lights up.
How this board's letter grades distribute.
Plates earned by this board's clears.
Minimum, average, and maximum score at each competitive level.
Where this chart's passes sit, by competitive level.
No scores recorded yet — import yours to light this up.
No scores recorded yet — be the first.
Search by song name — every chart has its own page.
Level changes across mixes, from the catalog record.
From the similarity graph — evidence-weighted, rebuilt nightly.
Compared {0} charts ({1}) — none cleared the bar.
data.value: Mrgl compared {0} chartz ({1}) — nrglne cleared the barrgl.

data.name: Didn't quite make the cut ({0})
data.value: Mrgl didn't quite make the cutrgl ({0})

data.name: No significant matches — here's the closest we could find.
data.value: Nrgl significant matchesrgl — here's the closest we crgluld find.

data.name: Sign in to order by your own tier lists
data.value: Mrgl sign in trgl order by yrglur rgluwn tier listsrgl

data.name: Strongest match first — no difficulty applied
data.value: Strrglngest match first — nrgl difficulty appliedrgl

data.name: Easiest to clear first, from your Pass tier list
data.value: Mrgl easiest to clear firstrgl — frrglm yrglur Pass tier listrgl

data.name: Easiest to clear first, from the community Pass tier list
data.value: Mrgl easiest to clear firstrgl — frrglm the cmrglmunity Pass tier listrgl

data.name: Easiest to score first, from your Score tier list
data.value: Mrgl easiest to score firstrgl — frrglm yrglur Score tier listrgl

data.name: Easiest to score first, by scoring level
data.value: Mrgl easiest to score firstrgl — by scoring levelrgl

data.name: Chart analysis made possible by
data.value: Mrgl chart analysis made prglssible byrgl

data.name: Share of the chart each pattern and demand covers
data.value: Mrgl share of the chart each pattern and demand crglversrgl

data.name: Switch on a filter to narrow what this chart is compared against.
data.value: Mrgl switch on a filterrgl to narrow what dis chart gets compared againstrgl.

data.name: This chart has no {0} on record
data.value: Mrgl dis chart got no {0} on recordrgl

data.name: Show the least matching charts instead
data.value: Mrgl show da least matching chartzrgl instead

data.name: {0} charts, chosen for being nothing like this one.
data.value: {0} chartzrgl, picked for bein nothin like dis one.

data.name: Of everything within reach, these are the least like it.
data.value: Of everythin within reachrgl, dese is da least like it.

data.name: The opposite is picked from everything in reach, so ranges don't apply to it
data.value: Da opposite gets picked from everythin in reachrgl, so rangesrgl don't apply to it

data.name: Import Lede
data.value: PIU Scores mrgls into your piugame.com account and glubs in your new and improved scores. Once it starts, you can swim away — it finishes in the background.

data.name: Import Password Helper
data.value: Used to mrgl in, never stored — unless you turn on Remember below.

data.name: Import Broken Helper
data.value: Also glubs in Brglubrgl scores from your recent plays; passing scores replace them later.

data.name: Import Manual Step 1
data.value: Choose which pages of your best glublrgl to pull. Leave To page empty for all of them.

data.name: Import Manual Step 3
data.value: While logged in on phoenix.piugame.com, paste it into the browser console (F12) — it downloads a CSV of your scores. Ad blockers can mrgl it up.

data.name: The import ran into an error.
data.value: The mrglport ran into an error.

data.name: Password Incorrect
data.value: Your shhhcret appears to be incorrect — could not mrgl in to phoenix.piugame.com.

data.name: Saved Password Incorrect
data.value: Your saved shhhcret appears to be incorrect — could not mrgl in to phoenix.piugame.com.

data.name: Import Error Notify
data.value: There was an error while glubbing your scores. Try again later. If this persists, notify DrMurloc.

data.name: Choose a game card, then press Import again.
data.value: Choose a Mrglcard, then press Mrglport again.

data.name: Import Confirming
data.value: Only new or improved glublrgl will be saved. Saving can't be undone — stopping midway keeps what's already saved.

data.name: Import Saving
data.value: Leaving or cancelling stops the upload; glublrgl already saved stay.

data.name: Import Failures
data.value: Some rows couldn't be mrglported. Download the failures, fix them, and re-upload.

data.name: Share of chart sections featuring each skill
data.value: Shrgre of chart sectrgns featrgring each skrgll

data.name: Import Manual Step 4
data.value: Upload the CSV here — also takes a hand-kept spreadsheet with the same columns.

data.name: Imported scores will appear here as they come in.
data.value: Mrglported glublrgl will appear here as they come in.

data.name: Baseline seed queued - it refuses to run once sealed snapshots exist
data.value: Mrglbaseline glrglqueued - no mrglrun if sealed snapmrgls exist! Mrgl!

data.name: Import queued - watch the runs table
level 24+, first ever, SS and up
data.value: lvl 24+, frst evrgl, SS n up

data.name: level 24+, must beat the standing record
No board history for that tag.
data.value: No mrglstory for dat tag. Blrgl.

data.name: No new grade firsts this week.
data.value: No new grade frsts dis wk. Mrgl.

data.name: No popularity snapshot yet - it lands with the weekly import.
data.value: No populrglity snapmrgl yet - comes wif wkly mrglport.

data.name: No PUMBILITY board on this mix - movers live on Phoenix 2.
data.value: No PUMBILITY mrglboard here - mrglmovers live on Phoenix 2.

data.name: No rankings yet - they appear after the first weekly import.
data.value: No rankmrgls yet - appear aftrgl frst wkly mrglport.

data.name: Nobody cleared the climb threshold this week.
data.value: Nomrgl clrgled da climb threshold dis wk.

data.name: Official play ranking - trend deepens weekly as snapshots accumulate.
data.value: Officiargl play rankmrgl - trend gets deeprgl each wk.

data.name: Pick a player to see their boards, history, and PUMBILITY over time - departed tags stay searchable.
data.value: Mrglpick a player - see mrglboards, hrglstory, PUMBILITY ovrgl time. Gone tags still findable! Mrgl!

data.name: Ranked by computed rating over the mirrored chart boards - this mix has no official PUMBILITY board.
data.value: Rankmrgld by computed ratmrgl - dis mix has no officiargl PUMBILITY board. Blrgl.

data.name: Ranked by the official PUMBILITY board, mirrored weekly.
data.value: Rankmrgld by da officiargl PUMBILITY board, mrglrrored wkly.

data.name: The first weekly snapshot has not landed yet - highlights light up after the next Sunday import.
data.value: Frst wkly snapmrgl not here yet - highmrglights light up aftrgl next Sunmrglday mrglport.

data.name: This week's snapshot is the baseline - week-over-week highlights begin next import.
data.value: Dis wk snapmrgl is da baseline - wk-ovrgl-wk highmrglights start next mrglport.

data.name: Top charts by computed rating - board totals are official; per-chart contribution is computed from score and grade.
data.value: Mrgltop charts by computed ratmrgl - board totrgls officiargl; per-chart bit computed from scrgl n grade.

data.name: There's nothing at this address — it may have moved with a mix, or it never existed. The search knows every chart.
data.value: There's nothing at this address — it may have moved with a mix, or it never existed. The search knows every chart.

data.name: No missing charts - every scraped board mapped to the catalog.
data.value: No missing charts - every scraped board mapped to the catalog.

data.name: The sweep saw these on the official site but found no catalog chart. Add the chart, then resolve - a still-missing chart relists on the next sweep.
data.value: The sweep saw these on the official site but found no catalog chart. Add the chart, then resolve - a still-missing chart relists on the next sweep.

data.name: Popularity refresh queued - re-attaches to the latest snapshot
data.value: Popularity refresh queued - re-attaches to the latest snapshot
